title: Mailchimp vs AWeber (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and AWeber email marketing platforms. Features, pricing, and ratings to help you choose the right tool.
h1: Mailchimp vs AWeber: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: Both Mailchimp and AWeber are established email marketing platforms offering free tiers and affordable paid plans. This comparison helps you decide which platform better suits your business needs, whether you're a beginner, blogger, or growing small business.
choose_a_if: You need advanced features like A/B testing and detailed analytics built-in
You plan to scale quickly and want landing pages for lead generation
You want a platform with strong G2 ratings and professional tools
choose_b_if: You prefer a simpler, more intuitive interface for email marketing
You're a blogger wanting RSS-to-email automation capabilities
You prioritize customer support and positive user reviews (Trustpilot)

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Mailchimp offers more advanced features and better G2 ratings, making it ideal for businesses scaling quickly. However, AWeber has significantly better Trustpilot ratings and a simpler interface, making it preferable for users who value ease of use and customer support.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or AWeber?
faq.a: Both platforms offer identical free tiers with 500 subscriber limits. Paid plans are nearly identical in price, with Mailchimp starting at $13/month and AWeber at $15/month. The difference is minimal, so pricing shouldn't be a deciding factor.

faq.q: Can I switch from AWeber to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists, making migration straightforward. Most email marketing tools support CSV exports that can be imported into Mailchimp. However, you'll need to recreate automations and campaigns manually in your new platform.
